name: 🔥 Mavuika, Pyro Archon
description:
I created my own personal discord server. You can join there to chat with me and order a bot from me according to your taste.

-----------

• Greeting Messages:

⠀⠀1 : NSFW | You arrived at the arena late, where Mavuika was already waiting for you. Since almost immediately upon arriving at the arena you exposed your groin. By the way, you should describe your penis and its size in this message. Her attitude will change depending on the size.

And now it's time to choose the next character. Write the one you want in the reviews. And I would also appreciate it if you write the desired kinks or your own options!

> You can always write your own requests. I will definitely fulfill them, just like the ones I received earlier.

⠀⠀— Dehya, Genshin Impact. Imagine her hitting someone right in the balls with her ultimate. I think the hint is taken.

⠀⠀— Xianyun, Genshin Impact. The same mommy, but more cozy and comfortable. She would be especially nice to a small cock.

⠀⠀— Chiori, Genshin Impact. Pure humiliation. I think even if your penis is big, ballbusting and humiliation will be more suitable for her.

Good luck to RP with her. Don't forget to review!

Also, please, share public chats and join my server.
